name: Chibi Doll World
description: Tizi Doll Town My Avatar Games also features a range of dress up doll games and doll world adventures. Play as a dress up game avatar and explore different outfits, hairstyles, and makeup choices. Whether youre customizing your doll’s wardrobe, changing her accessories, or deciding what makeup to apply, you’re in control of creating an avatar world full of beautiful and fashionable dolls.
instructions: Tap to choose the most beautiful outfits
